description: Learn the basics of robotics through a hands-on workshop led by engineering students.
Join an interdisciplinary conversation exploring the ethical challenges posed by modern AI systems.
Connect with fellow women in tech, share experiences, and build your professional network.
Meet dozens of student organizations, enjoy performances, and discover new ways to get involved on campus.
Discuss recent research articles on medical ethics in a collaborative, seminar-style format.
Test your hacking and problem-solving skills in a friendly cybersecurity competition.
Explore design strategies that make products more accessible, inclusive, and user-friendly.
Enjoy stargazing, telescope demos, and discussions about the night sky with fellow astronomy enthusiasts.
